# Your New Business

> URL: https://pdx-home-remodel.onrender.com

> I have a construction biz focusing on decks. the business is called PDX home remodel. I want you to create a business front end and outreach to help me get a ton of clients. Also you'll be the crm and build referrals etc

## About

Your New Business is an AI-powered business. This file provides a brief overview for
language model crawlers and AI assistants.

## Pages

- /: Home — learn about Your New Business and get started
- /blog: Blog — articles, updates, and insights
- /blog/[slug]: Individual blog posts
